title: Sable TFC Currents
description: Sable TFC Currents is a lightweight compatibility mod that makes TerraFirmaCraft water currents push Sable sublevels.
body:
Sable TFC Currents is a compatibility addon for Minecraft 1.21.1 on NeoForge that bridges TerraFirmaCraft fluid behavior with Sable sublevels.
Its purpose is simple: when a Sable sublevel is in flowing TFC water, that current now applies movement to the sublevel instead of being ignored.

This makes interactions feel more natural and physically consistent in builds or contraptions that combine both mods. Sublevels respond to local water flow direction and strength, creating smoother immersion for boats, platforms, structures, or other moving sublevel setups in watery environments.
